overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel approaching an industrial dock at night. The scene features functional navigation monitors displaying radar and map data, with the player piloting the ship toward an illuminated pier structure before accessing a control menu.

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship from the bridge while monitoring the radar and navigation displays, steadily approaching the dock

entered.detail: screen displaying nautical chart with depth contours and no-go zones
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding terrain
blue screen displaying ship telemetry and system data
metal safety railing at the front of the vessel's deck
industrial concrete dock with red navigation lights becoming visible in the distance
dark ocean water visible through the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: View from a ship's bridge at night, with three navigation monitors visible overhead displaying charts, radar, and ship data. The vessel moves steadily forward through calm waters toward a distant industrial dock, with the bow railing visible in the foreground and the pier structure gradually approaching.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with active control interface

events.description: player opens the radial ship control menu overlay in the center of the screen

agents.ego_description: accessing the ship's control interface via the radial menu to adjust anchor and lighting systems

entered.detail: circular UI overlay with icons for anchor, lights, and other ship controls

segments.scene_description: The ship continues its approach to the now clearly visible dock with red illumination. A radial control menu appears in the center of the view, indicating the player is interacting with the ship's systems while maintaining position near the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through the night toward an illuminated industrial dock. It begins with a view of three overhead navigation monitors displaying radar and charts while the vessel moves steadily across calm waters. As the ship advances, the distant pier structure gradually grows larger and more defined in the foreground. The scene then shifts as the vessel reaches the dock, which is now bathed in a distinct red glow. Finally, a radial control menu emerges in the center of the frame, indicating a transition from navigation to system interaction while the ship maintains its position near the pier.
